turns.content: What brings you in today?
My stomach's been hurting off and on for a few weeks. I don't feel like eating much.
When did this start?
I dunno... maybe three or four weeks ago? It just kind of started and won't go away.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right here, in my belly. Like a dull ache, kinda comes and goes. Sometimes it makes me feel like I'm gonna be sick.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever or nothing like that.
What medications are you currently taking?
None. I don't take any medicines.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
No. I haven't been sick before.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
No, nothing really. I just try to eat smaller amounts when I can.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Not really. Eating makes it worse sometimes, so I just eat less. But the pain just happens whenever.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I can't stand as long at work. I'm a cashier, so I'm on my feet all day. And I'm just not hungry much, so I feel kinda weak.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No, I don't smoke. I don't drink either.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Not really. My mom had some stomach troubles, but I'm not sure what.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, never had anything like this before.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, it's fine. I get it.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, maybe a 3 or 4 out of 10. Not the worst, but it's there. Emotionally, I'm just tired of it. Not real anxious, just kind of worn out.
Do you have any questions for me?
No, I don't think so. Just hope you can figure out what it is.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. That's why I'm here. You're the doctor.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No, that's it. Just want to find out what's wrong.
